subject: [PATCH 4/8] mm: memcontrol: track MEMCG_KMEM per NUMA node

2026-05-11.patch_summary: This patch removes the MEMCG_KMEM feature and instead introduces per-node obj_cgroup objects to track memory usage. It does not convert existing kmem users to proper per-memcg-per-node accounting, which is handled in subsequent patches. The changes include updates to memcontrol.h, mmzone.h, and memcontrol.c files.
